s-1.ptxt: INSTALL TIMING CHAIN CASE OIL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to a new oil seal lip.

atten3.ptxt: Keep the lip free from foreign matter.

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a hammer, tap in the oil seal until its surface is flush with the rear oil seal retainer edge.

atten3.ptxt: Wipe off extra grease from the crankshaft.

s3.ptxt: Align the pulley set key with the key groove of the pulley.
Using SST, fix the pulley in place and tighten the bolt.
Align the pulley set key with the key groove of the pulley.
Using SST, fix the pulley in place and tighten the bolt.

s2.ptxt: Using SST and 19 mm socket wrench, loosen the V-ribbed belt tensioner arm clockwise, then install the V-ribbed belt.

item.ptxt: Be sure to connect SST and the tools so that they are in line during use.
When retracting the tensioner, turn it clockwise slowly for 3 seconds or more. Do not apply force rapidly.
After the tensioner is fully retracted, do not apply force any more than necessary.

s2.ptxt: After installing the V-ribbed belt, check that it fits properly in the ribbed grooves. Check to confirm that the belt has not slipped out of the grooves on the bottom of the crank pulley by hand.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT FENDER APRON SEAL RH
